channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Heineken to host premium Champions League final viewing event in Lagos for Arsenal vs PSG
item.description: Heineken don announce grand plans to wrap up its nationwide UEFA Champions League campaign with a premium final viewing event for the Arsenal vs PSG match in Lagos. The event go hold on Saturday, May ...

item.title: Jesse Watters Criticized for Personal Attacks While Facing His Own Past Controversies
item.description: Fox News host Jesse Watters faced widespread criticism after personally attacking Texas Democratic Senate candidate Rep. James Talarico for being unmarried. During a live broadcast, Watters questioned...

item.title: U.S. Justice Department subpoenas Reddit and X to identify anonymous users critical of immigration enforcement
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has reportedly issued grand jury subpoenas to Reddit and X (formerly Twitter) as part of criminal investigations aimed at identifying anonymous users who criticized fede...

item.title: Affordable housing development planned for Acadia University area in Nova Scotia
item.description: A new affordable housing initiative is set to bring additional residential units to the Acadia University community in Nova Scotia, according to reporting by CTV News Atlantic. The project is part of ...

item.title: Trump Cancels AI Oversight Order Following Intervention from Former Adviser
item.description: Donald Trump was on the verge of signing a comprehensive executive order aimed at regulating AI companies in the United States, which would have required firms developing advanced AI models to submit ...

item.title: Norway Chess introduces new time controls and confessional booths to enhance gameplay and viewer experience
item.description: The Norway Chess tournament has long been known for introducing innovative ideas to make chess more engaging for both players and audiences. In the current edition, the organisers have implemented a f...

item.title: Study urges overhaul of climate models to better incorporate inequality, power dynamics and Global South perspectives
item.description: A recent study published in the journal One Earth calls for a major rethink of the climate and biodiversity models that shape global environmental policies. Led by researchers including Laura Pereira ...

item.title: Updated climate scenarios phase out extreme worst-case emissions pathway as policy progress reshapes projections
item.description: A recent analysis discusses changes to the suite of global climate change scenarios used by scientists to project future warming outcomes. The article explains that the widely referenced high-emission...

item.title: US-Iran escalation continues amid stalled peace talks, while Israel intensifies strikes in southern Lebanon
item.description: Tensions have escalated sharply in the Middle East as the United States and Iran continue exchanging military strikes amid stalled negotiations aimed at ending the ongoing conflict and reopening key t...

item.title: Risks of Drone Attacks Near Nuclear Power Plants in Active Conflict Zones
item.description: The article discusses the increasing risks that armed drone warfare poses to nuclear power plants, particularly in regions affected by armed conflict such as Ukraine, Russia, and the Middle East. It a...

item.title: Senior public service HR officials to meet in Dodoma to strengthen administration and digital reform
item.description: The Government of Tanzania is preparing to host a three-day high-level meeting in Dodoma bringing together senior human resource and administration officials from across the public sector. The meeting...

item.title: Maya Hawke’s Life, Relationships and Career Highlights
item.description: Maya Hawke, born on 8th July 1998 in New York City, is an American actress and singer-songwriter who has gained attention for her diverse acting roles and music career. She is the daughter of famous a...

item.title: Kenya: Katiba Institute seeks court halt to proposed U.S.-linked Ebola quarantine facility; demands full contingency plans
item.description: The Katiba Institute has filed an urgent petition in Kenyan court to stop the planned establishment of a quarantine facility for American citizens and others exposed to Ebola or similar infectious dis...

item.title: Malabon city holds recycling drive where residents earn money from recyclable waste
item.description: Residents of Malabon City in the Philippines were given an opportunity to earn extra income by exchanging recyclable waste for cash during a city-led recycling collection drive. The initiative, titled...

item.title: CBS News Chief Bari Weiss Absent from Emmy Awards as Internal Tensions Surface
item.description: Bari Weiss, who became head of CBS News last October, was notably absent from the News & Documentary Emmy Awards in Manhattan, where '60 Minutes' was nominated for 10 awards. Weiss's absence drew atte...

item.title: Katiba Institute Challenges Kenyan Government Over Proposed Ebola Quarantine Facility
item.description: The Katiba Institute has filed an urgent petition in court to challenge the Kenyan government’s proposed plans to establish Ebola quarantine facilities, including for Americans. The petition, filed un...

item.title: Jannik Sinner exits French Open second round after falling ill against Cerundolo
item.description: Jannik Sinner, world number one and hot favourite for the French Open, suffered a shocking second-round defeat to Argentina's Juan Manuel Cerundolo in a five-set thriller. Struggling with illness and ...

item.title: DR Congo asks FIFA for refunds after fans blocked from World Cup travel due to Ebola restrictions
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) has officially asked FIFA to refund World Cup tickets for supporters who are unable to travel because of new international travel restrictions linked to an Ebola...

item.title: Tourist bus carrying Velankanni pilgrims overturns near Nellore, several injured
item.description: A private tourist bus carrying 43 pilgrims travelling to the Velankanni Church in Tamil Nadu met with an accident early on Thursday near Chintareddypalem in Nellore district, Andhra Pradesh. According...

item.title: Victor Ochei steps down from APC membership after years in the party
item.description: Former Speaker of the Delta State House of Assembly, Victor Ochei, has officially resigned his membership from the All Progressives Congress (APC), the ruling party in Nigeria. In a resignation letter...
